fields.name: resultCode
fields.comment: Result code from A-Trust web service call.

fields.name: callbackSafetyHash
fields.comment: Hash code generated for more safety in internal callback link.

fields.name: forwardTargetUrl
fields.comment: URL for A-Trust. We give it back to caller in order to forward the user to this URL.

fields.name: signatureJob
fields.comment: Job data for this signature, passed by caller of this interface.

fields.name: signatureDocumentData
fields.comment: The output of A-Trust signature document data, you will get it back together with signed document in the signature result object.

fields.name: internalCallbackUrl
fields.comment: Internal Callback URL of this interface. (Here we prepare all data before we forward to callback URL of calling process)

fields.name: integrateNotInFrame
fields.comment: This indicator set for old approach using TaskTemplate8 - non iframe

fields.name: errorCallbackUrl
fields.comment: Error callback URL of this interface.

fields.name: signDocument
fields.comment: Wrapper object for adding new doc to sign batch
